subject: English
chapter: A House Is Not a Home
author: Zan Gaudioso

activities_projects.title: Psychological Changes in the Author
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the psychological transformation of the author
steps: Read the entire lesson carefully
Identify the emotional stages the author experiences
Write 6–7 sentences explaining his transformation

activities_projects.title: Symbolism in the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand symbolic elements in the narrative
steps: Identify symbols such as the fire, the house and the rebuilding process
Explain what each symbol represents

activities_projects.title: Importance of Memories
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the role of memories in the story
steps: Find the part where the mother saves photographs and letters
Explain why memories are important for the family
Write 5–6 sentences

activities_projects.title: Community Support
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how community support helped the author
steps: Read the part where schoolmates help the author
Explain how their support changed his outlook

activities_projects.title: Contrast Between House and Home
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the meaning of the title
steps: Explain the difference between a house and a home
Support your answer with examples from the story
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyses deeper meaning of the title

activities_projects.title: Character Study of the Author
steps: Identify the author’s qualities such as sensitivity and resilience
Write a short character sketch

activities_projects.title: Role of the Stranger
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of kindness from strangers
steps: Describe the role of the woman who found the cat
Explain how her actions affected the author

activities_projects.title: Life Lessons from the Story
steps: List the lessons learned from the story
Explain each lesson briefly

activities_projects.title: Narrative Style
steps: Identify the narrative point of view used in the story
Explain how it helps the reader understand the author’s emotions

activities_projects.title: Alternative Ending
steps: Imagine that the cat was never found
Write a short alternative ending to the story
